name: Create and Export Science Exam Backup Configurations
description: Create three Exam Configurations in SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, login: super-admin / admin) as offline backups. The configurations are: 'Math_Final_Offline' (Start URL: 'https://math.edu/exam', Quit Password: 'math_exit'), 'Physics_Final_Offline' (Start URL: 'https://physics.edu/exam', Quit Password: 'phys_exit'), and 'Bio_Final_Offline' (Start URL: 'https://bio.edu/exam', Quit Password: 'bio_exit'). Export these configurations as .seb files to ~/Documents/ExamBackups/ using the names 'Math_Final_Offline.seb', 'Physics_Final_Offline.seb', and 'Bio_Final_Offline.seb' respectively.
